title: Onboarding - Login
scenario: Verify that a new user can complete the onboarding flow, access the login dialog, and successfully log in to reach the Home Screen.
steps: Start the app for the first time, accept the license agreement, skip initial setup, and continue.
expected: 1. Login dialog appears with Cancel and Continue buttons.\n2. User is directed to login page with options to login/sign up via Microsoft, Apple, or Google, plus username/password fields and a login button.\n3. Home Screen is visible.
